identity: khonliang-bus — durable hub for the externalized-memory agent ecosystem
role: routes skill calls to agents; persists the catalog (registrations, skills, welcomes, artifacts, traces); manages agent lifecycle (install / start / stop / restart, autostart, crash supervision); bridges GitHub webhooks to bus events
boundaries: the bus itself is not a dispatchable agent — it has no callback and is never a routing target; agents are peer services it fronts
suggested_next: bus_welcome(detail='full') for the full platform + per-agent orientation
bus_skills(agent_id='bus') for the bus tool list with descriptions
bus_status for platform counts (agents, skills, flows)
